ideation: This sequence simulates the action of using scissors.  The robot will mimic holding scissors and making a cutting motion.  Because the robot lacks fingers, the action will be represented by a closing and opening motion of the hands. The left arm will remain relatively static, acting as an anchor point. The right arm will perform the main cutting motion.  I'll use the available joints to create a believable cutting action.  I'll make sure the transitions are smooth and the final pose is a natural resting position.

frames.beat: right arm moves forward, opening the scissors
the scissors close with a sharp motion
right arm moves back, preparing for the next cut
